faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Key information before you start generating and editing images.

items.question: What can I generate with Gpt Image 2 Api?
items.answer: You can create images from text prompts and edit existing images for layout, subject, style, and background updates.

items.question: Can this handle text-heavy visuals?
items.answer: Yes. It is optimized for clearer text rendering, including posters, labels, and dense layout graphics.

items.question: Can I keep a consistent style across outputs?
items.answer: Yes. Reusing structured prompts and reference assets helps keep color, composition, and tone consistent.

items.question: Is image editing supported?
items.answer: Yes. You can iterate on existing visuals with targeted edits instead of regenerating everything from scratch.

items.question: What formats can I export?
items.answer: Generated images can be downloaded in standard production-friendly formats such as PNG and JPEG.

items.question: Is this suitable for business usage?
items.answer: Yes. It is commonly used for marketing creatives, product visuals, and design exploration workflows.

cta.title: Build Better Image Assets in Minutes
cta.description: Open the generator, describe your visual direction, and iterate with fast edits until the result is production-ready.
